purpose: Define peer-equivalent benchmark contracts before making external performance or superiority claims.
rules: Do not compare Fleury tester-only timings against peer real-terminal timings without labeling the mode.
Record machine, operating system, terminal mode, language/runtime version, dependency versions, warmup count, measured iteration count, terminal size, and fixture scale.
Include correctness counters beside timing counters; a fast run with stale focus, broken selection, unsafe output leakage, or missing semantic/test coverage does not support a launch claim.
Separate ergonomics evidence from timing evidence. Lines of code, app structure, test shape, and command/action model are separate fields from p95 latency.
Keep peer result slots empty until the peer fixture is implemented and run from source-linked package versions.

scenarios.name: Time To Counter App
contract: mount one counter app
render first frame
trigger one increment via the framework's normal input/action path
render updated frame
assert visible count and query test/semantic/app state where available
claimGates: input/action path matches normal app use

scenarios.name: Text Editing Composer Stress
contract: mount multiline composer/editor plus secret field
drive grapheme-aware cursor movement
replace a selected range
exercise undo/redo and submitted-history navigation
accept one completion
paste a large mixed-width chunk
assert secret/redacted state never leaks through test artifacts
claimGates: selection and undo state are correct

scenarios.name: DataTable 100k Rows
contract: mount a 100k-row tabular data set
render first frame with visible virtualization
move selection by arrow and page
jump to the final row
copy/export the selected row
assert visible range, selected row, and row/cell test semantics where available

scenarios.name: LogRegion Tailing And Scrollback
contract: mount a large log buffer at the tail
append a burst containing unsafe terminal payloads
jump into scrollback and return to tail
copy the selected log row
filter/search the log corpus
assert unsafe payloads do not leak into visible output, copies, or test artifacts
claimGates: unsafe output leak count is zero

scenarios.name: Streaming Markdown
contract: stream markdown chunks incrementally
include headings, lists, code fences, links, long paragraphs, partial chunks, and unsafe links/control payloads
render after each append
copy one selected block
assert link policy and unsafe-frame count

scenarios.name: Dashboard Update Pressure
contract: mount a dense dashboard with progress, gauge, sparkline, bar chart, counters, and status rows
drive repeated state updates without remounting
record per-update pump/frame cost
assert semantic/test-visible progress and chart values where available
claimGates: layout work is reported or equivalent renderer work is documented

scenarios.name: Resize Storm
contract: keep a table/log/editor surface mounted
alternate normal, wide, narrow, and short terminal sizes
render every resize frame
assert focus, selected rows, visible ranges, and text input state survive
claimGates: semantic/test-visible core regions survive every resize

scenarios.name: Overlay And Command Palette Churn
contract: mount an app with global and active-screen commands
open a command palette repeatedly over a large command registry
filter, select, invoke, and dismiss through keyboard and semantic/test action paths
probe visible disabled commands
assert no stale palette rows or unexpected invocations
claimGates: stale palette and unexpected invocation counts are zero

scenarios.name: Subprocess Handoff And Untrusted Output
contract: run a large-output subprocess success path
run a stderr non-zero failure path
cancel one running subprocess
exercise terminal handoff or equivalent process-mode restoration
stream unsafe stdout/stderr-like output through an app-facing output region
assert unsafe payloads do not leak into visible output, copies, or semantic/test artifacts
claimGates: unsafe artifact leak count is zero

scenarios.name: Proof-App Journey
contract: mount a multi-screen developer console
navigate through command palette and screen controls
exercise global search, indexed logs, DataTable, transcript, process panel, diagnostics, and debug capture
assert app-level command/action/test semantics or closest peer test equivalents
claimGates: all major app regions are exercised

scenarios.name: TreeTable Hierarchy Filter And Copy
contract: mount a large hierarchical table with branch rows and leaves
expand branches
navigate and page through visible hierarchy
filter for a collapsed descendant
copy the selected filtered row
assert hierarchy semantics or nearest test equivalent
claimGates: copy text is exact and sanitized

scenarios.name: Layout Dirtiness Cache
contract: mount stable static and changing panes
record first frame, layout-affecting update, paint-only style update, paint-only text update, and idle frame
report equivalent renderer work if the peer does not expose layout performed/skipped counts
claimGates: update and paint-only paths are measured separately
equivalent peer renderer-work metric is documented
